violations.text: Varying shellfish items were observed not stored in a manner to prevent possible contamination of other seafood items. Shellfish were arranged for proper storage and prevention of cross-contamination at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 200 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Sanitizer solution was adjusted for proper sanitization at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

Reduced Oxygen Packaged Fish was observed stored thawed in its intact packaging in the Sushi Cold Drawer Unit at 33 degrees Fahrenheit. Based on temperature observed at below 38 degrees Fahrenheit, fish was removed from packaging at the time of inspection for proper storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026
